title: Fix task system UI desync on proposal build failures — preserve self-healing
summary: Proposal tasks with Anthropic models self-heal build errors successfully, but UI shows "paused" while agent continues. Fix: implement retry counter so agent can recover once (letting Claude self-fix), then pause if stuck. Preserves intelligent recovery, fixes UI desync.

affectedFiles.description: Add build failure retry counter; replace unconditional pause with intelligent retry logic
